epwshiftr 0.1.4.9001
  • Articles
    • Manage CMIP6 CVs and Data Request
  • Manual
  • News

ESG Project Dictionary

Source: R/dict.R
EsgDict.Rd

EsgDict stores project-specific ESG controlled vocabulary data, query indices, and validation metadata for local option discovery and legality checks.

esgdict(project = "CMIP6")

esgdict_set_default(dict)

esgdict_get_default(project = "CMIP6")

Arguments

project

ESG project identifier, such as "CMIP6" or "CMIP6PLUS".

dict

An EsgDict object used as the package-level default dictionary for its project.

Value

esgdict_set_default() returns dict, invisibly. esgdict_get_default() returns the current package-level default dictionary for project, or NULL.

See also

esgdict_option() and esgdict_check() for user-facing discovery and validation helpers.

Author

Hongyuan Jia

Method is_empty()

Usage

EsgDict$is_empty()

Method build()

Usage

EsgDict$build(
  token = NULL,
  force = FALSE,
  cv_tag = NULL,
  request_tag = NULL,
  dreq_tag = NULL,
  use_cache = TRUE,
  cache_dir = esgdict__raw_cache_dir(project = private$m_project)
)

Method get()

Usage

EsgDict$get(type)

Usage

EsgDict$capabilities()

Usage

Usage

EsgDict$fields()

Method indices()

Usage

EsgDict$indices(type = NULL)

Method options()

Usage

EsgDict$options(field, ...)

Method check()

Usage

EsgDict$check(
  ...,
  error = FALSE,
  suggest = TRUE,
  n_suggestions = 5L,
  relationship = c("any", "all_pairs")
)

Method save()

Usage

EsgDict$save(
  dir = getOption("epwshiftr.dir", "."),
  file = NULL,
  allow_empty = FALSE
)

Method load()

Usage

EsgDict$load(dir = getOption("epwshiftr.dir", "."), file = NULL)

Method print()

Usage

EsgDict$print()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
dict <- esgdict(project = "CMIP6")
dict$build(cv_tag = "6.2.58", request_tag = "01.00.33")
dict$save()

esgdict_set_default(dict)
esgdict_option("experiment_id", activity_id = "CMIP")
esgdict_check(activity = "CMIP", experiment = "historical")
} # }
